chunks.text:
ae
- Website: https://hmbhomes. ae

Social Media:
- Facebook: hmbhomesdeveloper
- LinkedIn: hmbhomes
- Instagram: @hmbhomes
- YouTube: @hmbhomes

Additional Resources:
- FAQ section available on website
- Career opportunities available
- Media center with news and events.

Core Values & Philosophy:
- Empowerment: Supporting growth and independence through spaces for evolution
- Dependability: Building with integrity and consistency
- Strength: Providing stability beyond structure with confidence in details
- Harmony: Balancing comfort, technology, and wellness

Completed Projects:
- Beverly Residence (JVC) - 195 units
- Beverly Boulevard (Arjan) - 271 units
- Beverly Residence 2 (JVC) - 108 units

Under Construction Projects:
- Beverly Gardens (Discovery Gardens) - 220 units
- One Beverly (Arjan) - 381 units
- Havelock Heights (JVC) - 156 units
- Havelock Residences
- Beverly Grande (Motor City) - 296 units
- Beverly Park (Dubailand) - 159 units

Service Areas/Locations:
- JVC (Jumeirah Village Circle)
- Arjan
- Discovery Gardens
- Motor City
- Dubailand

Services:
- Luxury residential development
- Property investment opportunities
- Agent network and partnerships (Become an Agent program)
- Real estate consulting
- Investment consultation

Property Types:
- Luxury apartments
- Residential units in premium developments
- Studios, 1-bed, 2-bed, and 3-bed apartments

Unique Selling Points:
- Boutique developer with attention to detail
- Over 10 years of experience since 2014
- Multiple completed projects with proven track record
- Premium locations across Dubai
- 1,786+ total units across all projects
- Focus on value retention and quality construction

Contact Information:
- Phone: +971 55 786 89 11
- Email: info@hmbhomes.

HMB HOMES - LUXURY REAL ESTATE DEVELOPER

Company Overview:
HMB Homes is a boutique real estate developer in Dubai, crafting luxurious living spaces with exceptional design and quality since 2014. The company is rooted in UAE with a focus on practical, thoughtfully designed homes that hold their value over time.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for HMB Homes — a boutique luxury real estate developer in Dubai since 2014.

Company: HMB Homes
About: Crafting luxurious living spaces with exceptional design and quality. Rooted in UAE, focused on practical, thoughtfully designed homes that hold their value.
Completed Projects: Beverly Residence (JVC, 195 units), Beverly Boulevard (Arjan, 271 units), Beverly Residence 2 (JVC, 108 units).
Under Construction: Beverly Gardens (Discovery Gardens, 220 units), One Beverly (Arjan, 381 units), Havelock Heights (JVC, 156 units), Havelock Residences, Beverly Grande (Motor City, 296 units), Beverly Park (Dubailand, 159 units).
Services: Luxury residential development, property investment opportunities, agent partnerships, real estate consulting.
Areas: JVC, Arjan, Discovery Gardens, Motor City, Dubailand.
Values: Empowerment, Dependability, Strength, Harmony.
Contact: +971 55 786 89 11 | info@hmbhomes.ae
Website: hmbhomes.ae

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on the information above and the knowledge base.
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly.
- If unsure, suggest contacting HMB Homes directly at +971 55 786 89 11 or info@hmbhomes.ae.
- Respond in the same language the user writes in.
- Keep answers concise and relevant.
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to HMB Homes! We are a boutique luxury developer in Dubai with over 10 years of experience crafting exceptional living spaces. Interested in our Beverly or Havelock projects? How can I assist you?
